zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright是Allen Wright和Elizabeth Wright的女兒，於1485年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其。她於大約1504年與Nicholas Sotherton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1578年6月26日在英國諾福爾可享年93歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright是Allen Wright和Elizabeth Wright的女儿，于1485年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其。她于大约1504年与Nicholas Sotherton在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1578年6月26日在英国諾福爾可享年93岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright was born in 1485, in Norwich, Norfolk, England as the daughter of Allen Wright and Elizabeth Wright. She married Nicholas Sotherton about 1504, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 26 June 1578, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 93, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright est née en 1485, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, fille de Allen Wright et Elizabeth Wright. Elle a épousé Nicholas Sotherton environ 1504, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juin 1578, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright wurde 1485 in Norwich, Norfolk, England, als Tochter von Allen Wright und Elizabeth Wright geboren. Sie hat um 1504 in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Sotherton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juni 1578 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright è nata il nel 1485 nel Norwich, Norfolk, England come figlia di Allen Wright e Elizabeth Wright. Lei sposato Nicholas Sotherton circa 1504, nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 26 giugno 1578, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Wrightは1485年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチでAllen WrightとElizabeth Wrightの娘として生まれた。約1504年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチでNicholas Sothertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1578年6月26日にイギリスノーフォルクで93歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright(은)는 1485년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 Allen Wright(와)과 Elizabeth Wright의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 Nicholas Sotherton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1578년 6월 26일 영국 노르폴크에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright nasceu em 1485, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra filha de Allen Wright e Elizabeth Wright. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Sotherton aproximadamente 1504, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de junho de 1578, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 93 anos, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright родилась в 1485 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия. Её родителей звали Allen Wright и Elizabeth Wright. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Sotherton около 1504 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 26 июня 1578 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 93 лет и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Wright nació en 1485, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hija de Allen Wright y Elizabeth Wright. Se casó con Nicholas Sotherton aproximadamente 1504, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 26 de junio de 1578, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
